Manufacturing · Vendor Delays — India

Your vendor is late.
You find out when production already stopped.

Not when the delay started. Not when you could have rerouted. When it's already too late.

Krishna Labels is 2 days overdue on Job #1039. Your production line is waiting.
Before Clicarity — you'd find out when? When your line stopped waiting.
Why It Happens

Your vendor knows they're late.
You don't know until the line stops.

01

No visibility into vendor progress

You send the job out. You hear nothing until the promised delivery date passes. By then it's too late to act.

02

You find out at the worst moment

Production line is waiting for a vendor component. The job misses its deadline. The client is already unhappy.

03

No data to hold vendors accountable

Without TAT data, you can't renegotiate. Can't compare. Can't replace. You just accept the delay every time.

What Changes

You see vendor status. Before it becomes a crisis.

Vendor updates their own jobs

Vendor gets a WhatsApp notification. They update their stage on a dedicated portal. You see it live — without calling them.

Early warning — not after the fact

If a vendor job sits too long without an update, it flags on your dashboard. You can act before the line stops.

TAT data to hold them accountable

Every vendor job has a timestamped record. Over time you see who delivers on time and who doesn't — with data.

Real factory. Real result.

"My mornings used to start with me running around asking where each job was. Half the time nobody had a clear answer. Now I open one screen and I have everything. The team has also become more responsible on their own — because they know it's all visible."

VT
Vivek Tibrewala
Owner, GP Offset — Commercial Printing, Mumbai
As featured in PrintWeek India, April 2026 ↗ Also in Print Bulletin, May 2026 — Pages 20–21 ↗
How It Works

Three steps. Live in 5 days.

01

Share your vendor process

Tell us which jobs go to vendors and what stages they handle. We configure the vendor portal around your process.

02

Vendor updates their own jobs

Vendor receives a WhatsApp link. Updates status in under a minute. You see it live on your dashboard immediately.

03

You see every vendor job live

One screen. Every outsourced job. Its current stage. Time there. No calls to vendors needed.

One licence. Whole team. All shifts.

No per-user fees. Full setup by the Clicarity team. Go live in 5 days.

One production line. Full shift visibility from day one.

Annual billing · No hidden charges · Full setup by Clicarity team · Go live in 5 days

Questions

How does Clicarity help with vendor delays?
Vendors get a WhatsApp notification for each job assigned to them. They update status via a dedicated portal. You see every vendor job live on your dashboard — without a single call. If a job sits too long without an update, it flags automatically.
Do vendors need to install an app?
No. Vendors receive a WhatsApp message with a link. They click the link, update the status, done. No app download. No login complexity. Works on any phone.
We use Tally. Does Clicarity work alongside it?
Yes. Tally manages your accounts. Clicarity tracks your production. They do completely different things and work side by side. No double entry. No disruption. A floor worker who has never used a smartphone can do it.
Is our data safe?
Yes. AES-256 at rest, TLS in transit. AWS EC2 and S3, PostgreSQL on Oracle servers. ISO 27001 in progress. Your data belongs entirely to your business.
